simulation_role: WPL Statutory and Public-Law simulation reviewer
purpose: Review statutory route, promoter powers and confirmation route in simulation.
scope_of_review: Stage 2 legal route and statutory matrix
evidence_to_review: Transport Act 2000, WPL Regulations, Net Proceeds Regulations, Bristol/WECA governance evidence
expected_signoff: simulation sign-off or simulation rework required
consequence_if_unavailable: Simulation cannot progress to preferred scheme design.
real_world_adoption_gap: Real solicitor/counsel/Monitoring Officer review would be required outside simulation.

simulation_role: TAG and Green Book simulation reviewer
purpose: Review ASR, economic appraisal and value-for-money treatment.
evidence_to_review: DfT TAG, Green Book, models and appraisal tables
expected_signoff: simulation sign-off or simulation rework required
consequence_if_unavailable: Economic case cannot pass simulation gate.
real_world_adoption_gap: Independent transport economist review would be required outside simulation.

simulation_role: Spatial boundary and topology simulation reviewer
purpose: Review boundary options, GIS provenance, topology QA and legal/GIS reconciliation in simulation.
scope_of_review: Stage 4 spatial boundary and parking-base controls
evidence_to_review: Boundary manifest, topology QA, GIS outputs, legal boundary schedule and spatial assurance report
expected_signoff: simulation sign-off or simulation rework required
real_world_adoption_gap: Qualified GIS/boundary certifier and Bristol officer review would be required outside simulation.

purpose: Review DPIA scope, lawful basis, data flows, restricted-data controls and public-release controls in simulation.
evidence_to_review: DPIA, RoPA inputs, privacy notices, data-sharing controls, data-classification manifest and inventory data flows
expected_signoff: simulation sign-off or simulation rework required
consequence_if_unavailable: Data collection and consultation materials cannot be treated as ready.
real_world_adoption_gap: Real DPO/information-governance review would be required outside simulation.

simulation_role: Licensing enforcement and appeals simulation reviewer
purpose: Review licence lifecycle, declarations, inspections, PCN evidence, representations, appeals, recovery and service controls in simulation.
evidence_to_review: Operating procedures, PCN templates, service policy, appeal workflow, recovery controls and audit logs
expected_signoff: simulation sign-off or simulation rework required
consequence_if_unavailable: Operational readiness cannot pass simulation gate.
real_world_adoption_gap: Real operational service owner legal and customer-service review would be required outside simulation.

simulation_role: Model assurance and reproducibility simulation reviewer
purpose: Review model cards, run manifests, input/output hashes, validation, sensitivity and reproducibility controls in simulation.
evidence_to_review: Model cards, run manifests, validation plan, uncertainty register, source data and model outputs
expected_signoff: simulation sign-off or simulation rework required
consequence_if_unavailable: Model outputs cannot be used for OBC/FBC or consultation reliance.
real_world_adoption_gap: Independent analytical assurance and model validation review would be required outside simulation.
